data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Iran reportedly reviewing US proposal to end war • Macron says he discussed Hormuz situation with Iran's president • Iran will surrender uranium to US, Trump claims
